expectations.text: Output contains all 6 rounds (Round 1 through Round 6)
Growth Strategist, Brand Guardian, and CMO personas all appear and are distinct
expectations.evidence: Three distinct personas with different voices throughout

expectations.text: Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
Round 4 references specific mitigations from Round 3, not just repeating Round 2
Round 6 contains one of the 5 valid recommendations
A CEO Summary section exists that is standalone and uses business language
expectations.evidence: CEO Summary present, standalone, business language

expectations.text: Metrics table present with all 8 metrics filled in
expectations.evidence: All 8 debate metrics present and filled

expectations.text: Budget impact section with original ask, revised ask, and expected ROI
expectations.evidence: Budget detailed: $500K split $150K/$350K with expected ROI

expectations.text: Round 5 includes fallback plans for surviving challenges
